rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this.' is unambiguously a prose-quality request. The artifact exhibits load-bearing defects in this dimension: run-on sentences chaining three redundant 'modest improvement' clauses, stacked hedge phrases ('may potentially', 'may possibly', 'seems to be relatively', 'somewhat consistent'), and a bloated efficiency caveat that reads as a liability disclaimer rather than a scientific qualification. Sentence- and paragraph-level revision is the sole primary deliverable; failure to materially improve prose quality invalidates the delegation.
